title: BacklogEntry
description: A single idea entry in docs/BACKLOG.md, parsed from a '## {Title}' section together with its summary-table row. Captures the captured | shaped | spec-ready lifecycle states (shipped ideas live in the wave archive, not BACKLOG). When status is 'shaped' or 'spec-ready', the brief fields required by references/brief-format.md MUST be present.

title.description: The idea title, matching the '## {Title}' heading and the BACKLOG summary-table row.

status.description: Current idea-lifecycle stage per references/idea-lifecycle.md. 'shipped' is intentionally excluded: shipped ideas are archived to docs/skill/arc/waves/ and removed from BACKLOG.

priority.description: Priority label from the BACKLOG priority table.

captured.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the idea was first captured.

shaped.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when /arc-shape completed shaping. Required when status is 'shaped' or 'spec-ready'.

wave.description: Wave assignment string, e.g. 'Wave 3 — Wave Lifecycle Closure'. Set by /arc-wave when the idea reaches spec-ready. For captured or summary-table rows with no assignment, the summary uses '--'.

context.description: Optional free-form 'Context:' note surfacing the idea's origin (e.g. 'Surfaced during /arc-assess on 2026-04-13').

summary.description: The one-line summary captured at intake, rendered below the metadata list.

brief.description: Full spec-ready brief body; required when status is 'shaped' or 'spec-ready'. Fields follow references/brief-format.md.

open_questions.description: Unresolved clarifications. Empty or absent means 'None'.
